rationale: Adding a getter method to encryption options; API ergonomics improvement with no spec rule violated.

Spec requires raising error when hint used with unacknowledged update; driver was not raising the required error.
Creating an Evergreen CI build task for RPM packaging; build/CI infrastructure with no spec involvement.
Adding ability to run subset of tests in test_driver target; internal tooling improvement, not spec-related.
Proposing concise syntax for BSON element access; pure API ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
Adding test that ElectionInProgress is not resumed; depends on DRIVERS-1318, spec test addition.
Implementing Hidden Indexes feature rollout from DRIVERS-816; Improvement, not a nonconformance bug.
CI test failures on s390x Ubuntu 16.04 due to server 4.3 not throwing expected error; platform/server CI issue.
Stopping sync of unused YAML and .rst spec test files; test infrastructure housekeeping.
Encryption spec test CI failures due to invalid KMS security token; environment/credential issue not spec behavior.
RPM package build CI task failing on Evergreen; build/packaging CI failure with no spec involvement.
Updating change stream tests to correctly express lack of event assertions; depends on DRIVERS-1028, test file update.
Auditing and cleaning up example code for docs consistency; documentation maintenance with no spec involvement.
Fixing Coverity static analysis warning about useless using-declaration; no spec behavior involved.

Adding operator[] convenience method to document::value; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule.
Adding user-defined literal for bson::from_json; API sugar feature, no spec conformance issue.
Fixing Hugo 'ref' syntax compatibility for documentation site; docs tooling bug, no spec involvement.
Allowing BSON values to implicitly convert to views; API ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
Fixing doxygen parameter name warnings in documentation; docs tooling, no spec behavior involved.
Adding constructors to bson_value::value for direct construction; API improvement, no spec rule.
Compilation error with libc++ and C++17 due to optional template issue; build/compiler bug, no spec involvement.

Splitting installation docs into OS-specific guides; documentation improvement, no spec behavior involved.
Adding CI test variant with extra C driver alignment enabled; CI coverage improvement, no spec rule.
Documenting rpath configuration for non-standard install locations; documentation improvement, no spec issue.
Debian package build not bundling MNMLSTC headers correctly; build/packaging bug, no spec involvement.
Build failure on macOS arm64 due to x86 inline assembly in catch.hpp; build/portability bug, no spec rule.

Deprecating b_utf8 and k_utf8 symbols alongside CXX-1817 rename; API deprecation, no spec rule involved.
Adding Data Lake test support per DRIVERS-829; test infrastructure addition for new server feature testing.
Adding comparison operators for bson_value and element; API improvement, no description or spec rule.

Missing get_string() method in 3.6.2 release headers; release packaging regression, no spec conformance issue.

Changing invalid element access from BSON_ASSERT abort to thrown exception; API behavior improvement, no spec rule.
Adding append method to list builder for post-construction key-value pairs; API ergonomics, no spec rule.
Adding extract_document and extract_array methods to list builder; API improvement, no spec rule involved.
Removing builder::list in favor of explicit document/array builders; API refactoring, no spec rule involved.

Vendoring Fedora RPM spec file instead of downloading from Fedora; build/packaging improvement, no spec issue.
Updating JSON unit tests to expect space after 'base64' following C driver bug fix; test update for upstream change.
Upgrading unified test runner to schema version 1.1 to run versioned API spec tests; UTF runner infrastructure.
Flaky listLocalSessions aggregation test with timing dependency; intermittent test failure, not spec nonconformance.
